name: io.github.gx-55/multi-gmail-mcp
description: Manage multiple Gmail accounts in Claude Desktop — search, send, reply, draft, and organize.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth2 client ID from your Google Cloud project (alternative to ~/.gmail-mcp-oauth.json)

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth2 client secret from your Google Cloud project (alternative to ~/.gmail-mcp-oauth.json)
